codeReview.summary: The feature requirements are satisfied in the workspace state carried by commit 64d4657: the root workspace now declares Rust 2024, both crates still inherit via edition.workspace = true, and sensitive_compile explicitly covers impl_schema! expression matching plus Relation derive pass/fail contracts under Rust 2024. I found no blocking or non-blocking implementation defects in the reviewed compile surface.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker handoff claims commitId 90e8dab for this feature, but the actual feature changes are present in commit 64d4657 instead; review tooling cannot rely on the handoff commitId field alone.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff commitId=90e8dabafa1a39ccf7bd53dc78b0878056da24e7 points to only .factory/validation/m4-post-mission-followup-fixes/user-testing/synthesis.json, while git blame/log show the feature lines in core/tests/sensitive_compile.rs were added by 64d465786aaca7334a70cdbdef9259c55f1ff254 and current workspace files Cargo.toml, core/Cargo.toml, macros/Cargo.toml, and core/tests/ui/store/* match the feature description.

summary: Pass. Reviewed the transcript skeleton and the implemented workspace state for edition-metadata-and-compile-surface; the Rust 2024 edition metadata and targeted impl_schema!/Relation compile coverage are present and correct. No code issues found; one shared-state observation notes the handoff recorded the wrong commit id for the feature.
